Prof. Dr. İsmail YÜKSEK

İsmail Yüksek was born in 1963 in Maraşlı Village, Çaykara, Trabzon. He completed his primary education at Maraşlı Village Primary School in 1974, his secondary education at Beykoz Ziya Ünsal Middle School in 1977, and his high school education at Paşabahçe Ferit İnal High School in 1980.

Geri Dön
